name: write_file
description: Atomically write contents to a workspace file. Uses tempfile + rename so partial writes are not observable. Subject to the §11 sandbox; per-call subject to §8 trust budget. Counts as a §3 staged edit until the turn's atomic-diff application commits.

path.description: Workspace-relative or absolute path. Absolute paths must be inside the §11 sandbox.

content.description: Full new file content. The harness writes the file atomically; partial-update semantics are not supported (use read_file → edit → write_file).

create_dirs.description: If true, create missing parent directories. Default false — the harness errors on missing parent rather than silently create.

created.description: True iff the file did not exist before this call.
